strategy.name: EMA 20/50 Crossover with RSI Confirmation
strategy.description: Long-only trend-following on Nifty 50 constituents. Enter when EMA(20) crosses above EMA(50) AND RSI(14) > 50. Exit on opposite cross OR ATR(14)*2 trailing stop.

disclaimer: Past performance is not indicative of future results. Backtests are based on assumptions and historical data; live execution may differ materially. Content provided is not investment advice.
